simple.short: A simple watch used by soldiers to check the time during battles.
simple.long: Soldiers needed to be perfectly synchronized for attacks. This watch was practical and easy to read, just like the ones used by the Marleyan army in the series.

advanced.short: A transitionary 'trench watch' featuring a shrapnel guard and luminous dial.
advanced.long: This artifact represents the evolution from pocket watches to wristwatches, necessitated by the tactical demands of modern warfare. Its design mirrors the rugged aesthetic of military equipment seen in the final season's technological leap.
